rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Clear, centered page title at top of sheet. No monetary figures present; heading legible and distinct from entries.

rows.description: A Half years Poors Tax due at Lacy for Gardington
rows.notes: Amount clearly aligned in the rightmost three ruled columns as 0 | 16 | 0 (pounds | shillings | pence). Text is legible; column boundaries unambiguous.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half‑yearly poor rate due at Lacy relating to Yardington/Gardington, amounting to £0 16s 0d.

rows.description: Pd the Cook for Sewell at Lacy
rows.notes: Numbers read clearly as 11 | 10 | 0, well aligned under the pounds/shillings/pence rulings. Description text is clear.
rows.english_description: Payment to the cook for provisions or services for Sewell at Lacy.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the cook for provisions or services for Sewell at Lacy, amounting to £11 10s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Abwell Sr Will: Peters extraordinary Stipend for pursuing Studies in a foreign University for a year & half
rows.notes: Amount reads clearly as 10 | 0 | 0. Handwriting in description is legible though long; 'Abwell'/'Sr Will: Peters' reading is certain from script context.
rows.english_description: Extraordinary stipend paid to Sir William Peters for pursuing studies at a foreign university covering one and a half years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Extraordinary stipend paid to Sir William Peters for pursuing studies at a foreign university covering one and a half years, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Wrights Bill for mending Coll: Plates from Nov: 14 1728 to May 8. 1730
rows.notes: Numeric grouping clearly 1 | 17 | 6. Dates in description are legible; alignment to columns is unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Wright for repairing college plates covering the period 14 November 1728 to 8 May 1730.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Wright for repairing college plates covering the period 14 November 1728 to 8 May 1730, amounting to £1 17s 6d.

rows.description: Pd Fees to Counsellor Merwin for examining the Title of Kings Nymmet Liberty &c
rows.notes: Amount 2 | 2 | 0 is clear. Surname of counsellor reads as 'Merwin' but could be alternate spelling (Merwin/Mervin); 'Kings Nymmet' interpreted from local place-name style—description legible but with minor orthographic uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Legal fees paid to Counsellor Merwin for examining the title of the Kings Nymmet liberty and related matters.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Legal fees paid to Counsellor Merwin for examining the title of the Kings Nymmet liberty and related matters, amounting to £2 2s 0d.

rows.description: Pd for carrying away rubbish
rows.notes: Numbers read 5 | 17 | 6 and align well. Short description is clear and unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Payment for removal and disposal of rubbish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for removal and disposal of rubbish, amounting to £5 17s 6d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Collison for Work and Timber
rows.notes: Large round figure 20 | 0 | 0 clearly written and aligned. Surname 'Collison' read from handwriting with good clarity.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Collison for work and timber supplied for college works.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Collison for work and timber supplied for college works, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Pain the Brazier his Bill for the Kitchen Hall, Lodge & Chappel
rows.notes: Amount 15 | 12 | 6 is legible. 'Chappel' spelled archaically; 'Pain the Brazier' reading is clear though small.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Pain the brazier for metalwork and related bills for the kitchen, hall, lodge and chapel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Pain the brazier for metalwork and related bills for the kitchen, hall, lodge and chapel, amounting to £15 12s 6d.

rows.description: The Poors Tax for Yardington at Mids y
rows.notes: Amount reads 0 | 6 | 0. Place-name reads as 'Yardington' (or 'Gardington' variant in earlier line); 'Mids y' short for 'Midsummer' is inferred from abbreviation. Slight uncertainty in the place spelling.
rows.english_description: Poor rate for Yardington payable at Midsummer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Poor rate for Yardington payable at Midsummer, amounting to £0 6s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Townsend in part for Masons Work on the Back Buildings
rows.notes: Amount 52 | 10 | 0 is visually clear and aligned. Description is legible; 'Townsend' and 'Back Buildings' unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Mr Townsend for masoning work on the back buildings.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Mr Townsend for masoning work on the back buildings, amounting to £52 10s 0d.

rows.description: Pd the Cook for Sewell for Mids y
rows.notes: Amount 11 | 10 | 0 clearly written. This appears to be a second payment to the cook related to 'Mids y' (Midsummer).
rows.english_description: Payment to the cook for Sewell for the Midsummer period.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the cook for Sewell for the Midsummer period, amounting to £11 10s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Trimble for leathering the kneeling stools &c in the Chappel
rows.notes: Amount 11 | 5 | 0 aligned and readable. Surname read as 'Trimble' (handwriting slightly compressed); 'leathering the kneeling stools' phrase deciphered from context but with some letter-level uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Trimble for leathering the kneeling stools and similar furnishings in the chapel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Trimble for leathering the kneeling stools and similar furnishings in the chapel, amounting to £11 5s 0d.

rows.description: Postage of Letters on College Business
rows.notes: Amount reads 0 | 6 | 8; the '8' pence character is clear and within valid range. Description is straightforward and legible.
rows.english_description: Postage costs for letters sent on college business.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Postage costs for letters sent on college business, amounting to £0 6s 8d.

rows.description: Attree to Counsel for opinion and Gardy Titles
rows.notes: Amount 1 | 2 | 0 is readable but the description is uncertain: first word reads 'Attree' or 'At tree' and the tail phrase 'Gardy Titles' is a best interpretation of cramped handwriting. Significant uncertainty in exact wording of the description.
rows.english_description: Attendance to counsel for a legal opinion concerning Gardy (property) titles.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Attendance to counsel for a legal opinion concerning Gardy (property) titles, amounting to £1 2s 0d.

rows.description: Pd the Tavern Bill for Oct: & Nov: 12 last
rows.notes: Amount 1 | 8 | 0 clear. Date phrase 'Oct: & Nov: 12 last' legible; description unambiguous.
rows.english_description: Payment of the tavern bill for October and November of the previous year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the tavern bill for October and November of the previous year, amounting to £1 8s 0d.

rows.description: Pd the gardener for toil: work done in the Back Court in Dr Holes time
rows.notes: Amount 1 | 11 | 4 readable though the pence digit is compact. 'Dr Holes' surname read from script but could be 'Dr Hales' or similar; chosen based on letter shapes and context.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the gardener for labour carried out in the Back Court during Dr Hole's tenure, amounting to £1 11s 4d.

rows.description: Pd Mr Gaxler for Work & materials on the Back Buildings
rows.notes: Amount 21 | 0 | 0 is clear. The surname appears as 'Gaxler' / 'Gazler' / possibly 'Eagler' in the handwriting; the reading is uncertain due to flourished letters, so name transcription is approximate.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Gaxler for work and materials used on the back buildings.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Gaxler for work and materials used on the back buildings, amounting to £21 0s 0d.

rows.description: A Poors Tax for Yardington

rows.english_description_with_amount: Poor rate for Yardington (a regular poor rate installment), amounting to £0 6s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment for painting the chapel ceilings.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for painting the chapel ceilings, amounting to £45 0s 0d.

rows.description: Pd for the last years Progress
rows.notes: Amount 3 | 17 | 0 readable. The description's final word is unclear in the handwriting (reads like 'Progress' or 'Progers'); chosen 'Progress' as the closest sense, but significant uncertainty remains.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses paid for the previous year's progress (the Rector/Bursar's inspection tour), amounting to £3 17s 0d.
